declaredLane: documentation lifecycle, plan cleanup/progress slim policy, recurrence closeout false-green prevention, managed prompt coverage, stale-trace hard-fail lint, core cohesion/coupling lint, and issue investigation hypothesis verification guardrail
observedMutationClass: docs-lint hard-fail rules, dirty change auto-detection, rule-harness prompt metadata coverage, regression fixtures, doc lifecycle cleanup, completed-plan cleanup defaults, progress slim policy, current-route/backlog cleanup, command example normalization, issue investigation skill route, root-cause hypothesis guardrail, and recurrence closeout update
acceptanceEvidenceClass: docs-lint fixture tests, rules:sync-closeout, and full rules lint; no gameplay or Unity runtime acceptance evidence
rootCause: Existing rules lint only enforced recurrence closeout against explicitly supplied changedFiles or RULES_LINT_CHANGED_FILES, so a dirty unstaged/untracked working tree could produce a false green. Managed document discovery also skipped human-authored rule-harness prompt markdown, leaving prompt contracts outside metadata/link/doc_id checks. Earlier docs-lint coverage also missed active SSOT body drift, active plan lifecycle closeout wording, docs-side Unity .meta artifacts, active plan sprawl, reciprocal active plan references, active plan concrete artifact owner collisions, progress evidence overload, and uncertain root-cause wording in rules-only closeout artifacts.
prevention: Make rules:lint and rules:sync-closeout compute unstaged, staged, and untracked git changes when no explicit change list is supplied. Add rule-harness prompts to managed document discovery with required metadata, and keep regression tests for dirty recurrence auto-detection, prompt metadata coverage, owner root-cause investigation anchors, issue investigation skill routing, and uncertain rootCause wording. Keep completed plan files out of active/draft state, delete them after residual/evidence/owner movement is complete, and keep progress.md focused on current state, active owners, and next actions. Preserve the existing hard-fail checks for stale module data structure owners, missing guard anchors, reference-closeout wording in active plans, docs/**/*.meta artifacts, active non-progress plan budget, active plan mutual references, active plan concrete artifact owner collisions, and progress evidence artifact overload.
verification: node --test tools/docs-lint/tests/docs-lint.test.mjs; npm run --silent rules:sync-closeout; npm run --silent rules:lint
